ksa_text: Ability to monitor emerging regulatory requirements and assess the impact of regulatory changes on organizational compliance posture and strategic priorities.

dcwf.top_element_label: Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-A-005 (RC, Ability) maps to Digital Evaluator scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5589 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.559, nist_ai_rmf=0.533, ddat=0.444. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA RC-A-005 with composite 0.5589 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5589 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the RC domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. RC domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5589 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-A-005 (composite 0.5589) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.5589 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.5589 is not a standard requirement for Digital Evaluator at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5589, domain RC. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
